prompt: Hero is in the cutoff and villain is on the button. Who acts later after the flop?
why_v1: The button has position over the cutoff and gets to act later after the flop.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Villain acts later because the button has position over the cutoff.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Villain acts later here because the button is in position over the cutoff.
recap_v1: In position means acting later after the flop. Out of position means acting first, which matters because later action gives more information.
